query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_avaliadores (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  emailVerified TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  mustChangePassword TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
  obraId INT,
  evaluationFrequency ENUM('daily','weekly','monthly','quarterly','annual') DEFAULT 'monthly' NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('ativo','inativo') DEFAULT 'ativo' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastSignedIn TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX eva_company (companyId),
  INDEX eva_email (email)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_criteria_revisions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  version INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  descricao VARCHAR(255),
  isActive TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdBy VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ecr_company (companyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_pillars (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  revisionId INT NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  ordem INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ep_revision (revisionId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_criteria (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  pillarId INT NOT NULL,
  revisionId INT NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  fieldKey VARCHAR(100),
  ordem INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  ativo TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ec_pillar (pillarId),
  INDEX ec_revision (revisionId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_avaliacoes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  employeeId INT NOT NULL,
  evaluatorId INT NOT NULL,
  comportamento INT,
  pontualidade INT,
  assiduidade INT,
  segurancaEpis INT,
  qualidadeAcabamento INT,
  produtividadeRitmo INT,
  cuidadoFerramentas INT,
  economiaMateriais INT,
  trabalhoEquipe INT,
  iniciativaProatividade INT,
  disponibilidadeFlexibilidade INT,
  organizacaoLimpeza INT,
  mediaPilar1 DECIMAL(3,1),
  mediaPilar2 DECIMAL(3,1),
  mediaPilar3 DECIMAL(3,1),
  mediaGeral DECIMAL(3,1),
  recomendacao VARCHAR(100),
  observacoes TEXT,
  mesReferencia VARCHAR(7),
  locked TINYINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  durationSeconds INT,
  deviceType VARCHAR(20),
  revisionId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ea_company (companyId),
  INDEX ea_employee (employeeId),
  INDEX ea_evaluator (evaluatorId),
  INDEX ea_mes (mesReferencia)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_scores (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  evaluationId INT NOT NULL,
  criterionId INT NOT NULL,
  nota INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX es_evaluation (evaluationId),
  INDEX es_criterion (criterionId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_surveys (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  tipo ENUM('setor','cliente','outro') DEFAULT 'outro' NOT NULL,
  anonimo TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('ativa','encerrada','rascunho') DEFAULT 'rascunho' NOT NULL,
  obraId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX esu_company (companyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_survey_questions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  surveyId INT NOT NULL,
  texto TEXT NOT NULL,
  tipo ENUM('nota','texto','sim_nao') DEFAULT 'nota' NOT NULL,
  ordem INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  obrigatoria TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX esq_survey (surveyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_survey_responses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  surveyId INT NOT NULL,
  respondentName VARCHAR(255),
  respondentEmail VARCHAR(320),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX esr_survey (surveyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_survey_answers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  responseId INT NOT NULL,
  questionId INT NOT NULL,
  valor VARCHAR(20),
  textoLivre TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX esa_response (responseId),
  INDEX esa_question (questionId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_survey_evaluators (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  surveyId INT NOT NULL,
  evaluatorId INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ese_survey (surveyId),
  INDEX ese_evaluator (evaluatorId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_climate_surveys (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  status ENUM('ativa','encerrada','rascunho') DEFAULT 'rascunho' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ecs_company (companyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_climate_questions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  surveyId INT NOT NULL,
  texto TEXT NOT NULL,
  categoria ENUM('empresa','gestor','ambiente','seguranca','crescimento','recomendacao') DEFAULT 'empresa' NOT NULL,
  tipo ENUM('nota','texto','sim_nao') DEFAULT 'nota' NOT NULL,
  ordem INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ecq_survey (surveyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_climate_responses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  surveyId INT NOT NULL,
  cpfHash VARCHAR(64),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX eclr_survey (surveyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_climate_answers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  responseId INT NOT NULL,
  questionId INT NOT NULL,
  valor VARCHAR(20),
  textoLivre TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ecla_response (responseId),
  INDEX ecla_question (questionId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_external_participants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  nome VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  empresa VARCHAR(255),
  tipo ENUM('cliente','fornecedor') DEFAULT 'cliente' NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(320),
  telefone VARCHAR(20),
  status ENUM('ativo','inativo') DEFAULT 'ativo' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX eep_company (companyId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_climate_external_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  surveyId INT NOT NULL,
  participantId INT NOT NULL,
  token VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  used TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  usedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX ecet_survey (surveyId),
  INDEX ecet_token (token)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS eval_audit_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  companyId INT NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  actorType ENUM('admin','evaluator','system','anonymous') DEFAULT 'system' NOT NULL,
  actorId INT,
  actorName VARCHAR(255),
  targetType VARCHAR(50),
  targetId INT,
  details TEXT,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX eal_company (companyId),
  INDEX eal_action (action),
  INDEX eal_actor (actorType, actorId)
);
